events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! His guitar riffs with Queen are truly out of this world.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, marks his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock'n'Roll Icon
angles.copy: Still moving like Jagger at 83! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger, a true force in rock and roll history.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV changed the music landscape forever, kicking off with The Buggles. Did video really kill the radio star? We'll let you be the judge.

events.title: Oasis' Definitely Maybe turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and gave us a generation-defining soundtrack. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place in August 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people descended on a farm in New York for three days of peace, love, and music. Happy anniversary, Woodstock.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, would have been 91
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: King of Rock and Roll
angles.copy: Remembering the King today. Elvis Presley would have been 91. His legacy in music remains unmatched.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur, would have been 55
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Legend
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55 today. His words and music continue to resonate.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, would have been 84
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of guitar virtuoso Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84 today. His revolutionary guitar playing changed music forever.

events.title: The Beatles' Abbey Road turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. Still one of the most iconic album covers and track lists of all time.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Legend
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the inimitable Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon and trailblazer with The Pretenders.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock'n'Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock and roll swagger. As you were.

events.title: John Lennon's Imagine released 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon released his timeless anthem 'Imagine' on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Song for Peace
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A powerful message that still resonates today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple introduced the original iPod, revolutionising portable music, on this day in 2001.

angles.name: Music in Your Pocket
angles.copy: Can you believe it's been 25 years since the first iPod? It truly changed how we listened to music. What was the first album you loaded on yours?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the release date of the very first 007 film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Grab a martini (shaken, not stirred) and celebrate the enduring legacy of 007. Which Bond is your favourite?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary comedian and actor John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of comedy.
